hero.subtitle: A world of adventures awaits you
hero.desc: Multiplayer survival server for players aged 10 to 17. Build, explore and be part of a unique community.

que-es.title: What is SMPT 10-17?
que-es.card1-desc: A classic SMP server where the community builds, survives and thrives together in a shared world without losing the essence of Minecraft.
que-es.card2-desc: A safe and moderated space designed especially for teen players. Active, respectful and creative community.
que-es.card3-desc: We combine the vanilla experience with custom plugins and mechanics that make every game special and memorable.

como-funciona.title: How does it work?
como-funciona.step1-desc: Join our Discord server to stay updated on news, report players and chat with the community.
como-funciona.step2-desc: Copy the server IP, download the specified version and connect from Minecraft.
como-funciona.step3-desc: Download the installer, run it and the program will automatically configure all mods and the Forge profile in your launcher.
como-funciona.step4-desc: Participate in events, build with others, explore the world and help grow the community.

requisitos.title: Requirements
requisitos.rules-3: Use common sense and fair play
requisitos.rules-4: All mods must be installed on your PC

mods.title: Included Mods
mods.notice: ⚠️ All listed mods must be mandatory installed on your PC to play on the server.

quienes-somos.title: About us
quienes-somos.story-desc: SMPT 10-17 was born from the idea of creating a safe and fun space for teens in Minecraft. We are a team of passionate players seeking to offer a unique experience where creativity and community go hand in hand.
quienes-somos.team-desc: We have a dedicated staff of moderators and administrators working to keep the server active, safe and entertaining. We are always open to suggestions and new ideas.
quienes-somos.community-desc: More than a server, we are a community. We organize events, group builds and contests. Every member contributes to make SMPT an incredible place.

mas-info.title: More information
mas-info.link-form: Enrollment form: README.txt in the installation tool
mas-info.contact-staff: Always available on Discord, no guaranteed response 24/7
mas-info.schedule-maintenance: Daily during the night (server off time)
mas-info.schedule-discord: Messages and notification chat always available

footer.copyright: © 2026 SMPT 10-17. Not affiliated with Mojang AB or Microsoft.
footer.trademark: Minecraft is a registered trademark of Mojang AB.

discord-modal.title: SMPT 10-17 Discord
discord-modal.subtitle: Join our community
discord-modal.feature1-desc: Chat with other players in real time, share ideas and strategies.
discord-modal.feature2-desc: Report players who break the rules directly from Discord.
discord-modal.feature3-desc: Receive notifications about events, updates and maintenance.
discord-modal.feature4-desc: Participate in special events only for Discord members.

mods-modal.title: Mods Installation
mods-modal.subtitle: Follow these steps to play
mods-modal.step1-desc: Click Download Installer to get the ModInstaller-Setup.exe file.
mods-modal.step2-desc: Open the downloaded file and the installer will detect your .minecraft folder automatically. Just follow the on-screen steps.
mods-modal.step3-desc: The installer will copy all mods and create the SMPT 10-17 profile in your launcher automatically.
mods-modal.step4-desc: Select the SMPT 10-17 profile in your launcher, enter the server IP and the mods will load automatically. Enjoy!
